title: Minecraft but Chunks are Random
description: Every chunk randomizes into a different block
body:
![View of a hilly landscape. Each chunk is made of a different block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48ef8dcfecdf6b85a32b1014494568be7741f853_0.webp)
## Overview
When stepping into a chunk, a random block is chosen to replace every block in that chunk.

If you'd like to make a video or content using this pack, go for it! If you do so, you must provide credit to me (Ambiguous Chameleon) and provide a link to this pack in the description and/or comments. Thank you!


## Cheats & Commands

**Changes the chunk you're in to the block held in the mainhand**

```
/trigger ac.random_chunk.set_block
```


**Uninstalls the data pack** _[data pack version only!]_

```
/function ac_cheat:uninstall
```
